_comment: Reproducible paper benchmark config. All parameters are explicitly set so results are fully deterministic across runs. Use profile 'full' to reproduce the complete paper results.

synthetic._comment_effect_sizes: Cohen's d values: 0.0 (null/no shortcut) through negligible (0.2) to very large (2.0)
synthetic._comment_sample_sizes: Small, medium, and large sample sizes for power analysis
synthetic._comment_imbalance_ratios: Balanced (0.5), moderate (0.7), and heavily imbalanced (0.9) group splits
synthetic._comment_embedding_dims: Common embedding dimensionalities in vision and NLP models
synthetic._comment_shortcut_dims: Number of embedding dimensions affected by the shortcut signal
synthetic._comment_seeds: Number of independent random seeds per configuration for statistical reliability
synthetic._comment_corrections: Multiple testing correction methods (Bonferroni for FWER, BH for FDR)
